content_body: I have stayed at Outlaw Ridge for two years with a large group and friends and it has been great. The cabin is clean, nice and has amazing views. The large kitchen has enough room for all the women to cook together without stepping on each other's toes. Each room has its own bath, which was important for our group of couples. The management company has always been helpful and quickly responded to any questions. We look forward to staying at this or any of the cabins in this group again.
title: Great for a Large Group of Friends
